summary: Completed end-to-end testing of CSV upload feature (Phase 1 LLP support). Backend validates CIN/LLPIN identifiers, upserts by generic identifier field, maps LLP total_contribution to paid_up_capital, and returns entity-type breakdown. Frontend Data Upload card renders correctly with drag/drop, file input, result summary, and rejected-rows table. All core functionality working as expected.

minor_bugs.issue: Non-CSV file (text/plain) returns 200 instead of 400, but processes 0 rows
minor_bugs.impact: Not ideal UX, but functionally acceptable since no data is processed
minor_bugs.details: The backend checks if filename ends with .csv OR content_type starts with 'text', which matches text/plain. Consider stricter validation or return 400 when CSV parser finds no valid rows.

passed_tests: Backend: POST /admin/upload-csv with valid CIN, LLPIN, invalid identifier, missing name - correct counts (1 company inserted, 1 LLP inserted, 2 rejected)
Backend: Re-upload same CSV - correct upsert behavior (1 company updated, 1 LLP updated, 0 new inserts)
Backend: GET /companies returns 200 with pagination, includes uploaded entities
Backend: POST /admin/upload-csv with empty file returns 400 error
Backend: GET /admin/enrichment-progress returns 200 with priority cohort counts
Backend: GET /admin/stats returns 200 with data source breakdown
Frontend: Demo login via 'Try the Demo (Pro access)' button works
Frontend: Navigate to /admin/enrichment page loads successfully
Frontend: Data Upload card renders with all elements (dropzone, file input, template button)
Frontend: CSV file selection via file input works
Frontend: Upload button appears after file selection
Frontend: Upload completes and result panel displays
Frontend: Result shows correct entity-type breakdown (1 company added, 1 LLP added, 1 rejected)
Frontend: Rejected rows table displays with row number, identifier, and reason
Frontend: No runtime errors or error overlays
Frontend: Regression - all existing enrichment dashboard elements render (KPI cards, progress bar, governance status, instruction panel, recent sessions table)
